description: Public JSON Schema contract for Analitiq connection documents — the authored shape used in source control, PR review, and author-time tooling. Server-managed fields (connection_id, version, org_id, connector_id, connector_version, auth_state, created_at, updated_at) are forbidden in the authored shape and assigned by the connection service on ingest. The persisted-record shape is internal and not published. Source of truth: k2m.models.connection.ConnectionInput (Pydantic).

$schema.description: Connection schema URL (optional in API payloads, required for standalone files).
$schema.title: $Schema

alias.description: Stable connection slug; matches '^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]*$'. Immutable and unique within the owning organization.
alias.title: Alias

connector_alias.description: Stable alias of the connector this connection configures.
connector_alias.title: Connector Alias

discovered.description: Durable provider-discovered non-secret values keyed by post-auth output key. Spec: §Post-Auth Outputs.
discovered.title: Discovered

display_name.description: User-facing connection label (1-120 chars, no leading/trailing whitespace).
display_name.title: Display Name

parameters.description: Non-secret submitted values keyed by connection-contract input key. Optional `ssl_mode` must be one of `disable, allow, prefer, require, verify-ca, verify-full` per the database-endpoint TLS contract.
parameters.title: Parameters

secret_refs.description: Opaque secret-store pointers keyed by connection-contract input or post-auth output key. Values must match a known reference scheme: `connections/<path>`, `secrets/<path>`, `ssm:/<path>`, `arn:aws:secretsmanager:<region>:<acct>:secret:<id>`, `arn:aws:ssm:<region>:<acct>:parameter/<id>`, or `s3://<bucket>/<key>`. Spec: §Secret Storage Materialization.
secret_refs.title: Secret Refs

selections.description: Durable user-selected post-auth values keyed by post-auth output key. Spec: §Post-Auth Outputs.
selections.title: Selections

tags.description: Grouping/search labels (max 50, each 1-64 chars, unique, trimmed).
tags.title: Tags

title: Analitiq Connection
